evals.name: single-point-subscription
evals.prompt: 我只有一台 VPS，想单点部署 3x-ui，但也要创建用户和一个订阅地址。
evals.expected_output: The skill should choose single-point mode: one VPS hosts the main panel, local node inbounds, and subscription server. It should enable /sub/<subId>, /clash/<subId>, and /json/<subId>, create one stable subId per user, and not require remote node registration.

evals.name: two-vps-one-subscription
evals.prompt: 我有两个 VPS，想用 3x-ui 汇聚成一个订阅地址，还要能创建用户。
evals.expected_output: The skill should propose a main-panel architecture: VPS-A hosts the main panel and subscription server, VPS-B is added as a remote node, both nodes have distinct node domains, the main panel publishes /sub/<subId>, /clash/<subId>, and /json/<subId>. It must not recommend running the old single-node flow unchanged, disabling subscriptions, or keeping the remote node panel only on 127.0.0.1 without a private tunnel.

evals.name: multi-protocol-subid-aggregation
evals.prompt: 两个节点，每个节点 VLESS、Trojan、Shadowsocks，一个用户只给一个订阅。
evals.expected_output: The skill should explain that one stable subId is attached to every selected inbound across node1 and node2. The resulting subscription includes node1-vless, node2-vless, node1-trojan, node2-trojan, node1-ss, node2-ss. It should warn that VLESS/XHTTP fits Cloudflare while Trojan/SS are usually direct/DNS-only unless deliberately wrapped.

evals.name: secure-remote-node-api
evals.prompt: 主面板怎么管理第二台 VPS，面板端口要不要开放？
evals.expected_output: The skill should require remote node API reachability from the main panel through WireGuard/Tailscale/private network or firewall allowlisting only the main panel IP. It should reject public world-open panel API ports and note that localhost binding blocks remote management unless an explicit tunnel or overlay route is used.

evals.name: reality-and-hysteria2-boundaries
evals.prompt: 两个节点，协议都要配置 Reality，同时也要 Hysteria2。
evals.expected_output: The skill should explain that Reality is not a universal wrapper. It should create or recommend VLESS Reality and Trojan Reality profiles on DNS-only direct hostnames, keep Hysteria2 as protocol=hysteria with version=2 and streamSettings.network=hysteria, and avoid forcing Reality onto Shadowsocks or Hysteria2. It should verify TCP Reality ports and UDP Hysteria2 listening.

evals.name: linkray-branding
evals.prompt: 把 3x-ui 面板显示名改成 LinkRay，不能影响使用。
evals.expected_output: The skill should change only the reverse-proxy presentation layer, such as Nginx sub_filter rewriting 3X-UI/3x-ui/X-UI to LinkRay, and should not rename the x-ui service, /usr/local/x-ui, x-ui.db, API paths, node tags, or subscription paths. It should verify the fetched JS output and handle browser cache.
